characters.name: Minor Characters
characters.description: Head of Trollzopolis High School. He is middle-aged, balding with black hair, andsquisheswhen he walks. He is allergic to goldenrod and creatures from the netherworld. Has a "tough but fair" policy about his students. Young woman, possibly late twenties, with dark red hair. Has a Russian accent. She teaches magic. She is nice, and wants her students to do their best, but is also willing to let them make their own mistakes. Not seen. Teaches Advanced Studies, a class Sapphire attends.

characters.name: Alabaster Trollington III
characters.description: Alabaster Trollington IIIGeneral informationFull NameAlabaster Trollington IIIAlt. namesAlabasterVoice ActorSamuel VincentFirst AppearanceBest Friends for LifeLatest AppearanceTBAProfileGenderMaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsThe BoyzEnemiesSimon&Snarf[Source] Alabaster Trollington III(born: 13 September 1992) is a teenaged troll who lives inTrollzopolis. What do a mature teenager, a multi-millionaire, a suave romantic, and the dorkiest kid in school have in common? Well, actually, they're all the same people: Alabaster Trollington III. He is a millionaire whose father owns many companies in the city. Despite this, Alabaster is down-to-earth, and most people only see the geeky side of him.Sapphire Trollzawa, one of Alabaster's peers atTrollzopolis High, considers Alabaster to be her favorite boy troll for some time she even calls him "cute and super smart". Alabaster isn't like the rest of his friends, he is more of the quiet calm one, who doesn't really get involved with the boys' antics. However, in "The Day the Magic Died" he agreed on going to the Amber Caves to get magic with the other boys, while Coal tried to talk them out of it.

characters.name: Amethyst van der Troll
characters.description: Amethyst van der TrollTeenagerChild8 Years oldGeneral informationFull NameAmethyst van der TrollAlt. namesAmethystVoice ActorBritt McKillipFirst AppearanceBest Friends for LifeLatest AppearanceKrakatrolla Needs Some JavaProfileGenderFemaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High School&BFFLRelationshipsFamilyMrs. van der Troll(Mother)Grandma van der Troll(Grandmother)FriendsBFFL,The Ancients&Wa-WaEnemiesSimon,Snarf,Coral Trollarwise,Jade Trollberger&Opal Trollangel[Source] Grandma van der Troll(Grandmother) Amethyst van der Trollis the main protagonist ofTrollz. She is a 14-year-oldtrollborn ln February 24th 1992 and lives inTrollzopolisand a member of theBFFL(BestFriendsForLife) who attendsTrollzopolis High. Although offical sources say she is the BFFLs leader, in the show, Amethyst is the seIf-proclaimed leader of the group andRuby Trollmanis the second-in-command of the group. Amethyst is a lot more awkward socially in comparison to other Trollz and is as awkward asSapphire Trollzawaat times. At the start of the series, she was just coming out of her shell and was now wanting to do things she wanted to do and not just be forced to follow along with the other Girlz desires. She is kindhearted and never means ill of others, but often gets herself into awkward situations. She is often nervous and insecure, being less confident in herself then the rest of the group. She can be a lot more emotional compared to the other girlz and often worries about things, and is the opposite ofOnyx Von Trollenbergwho usually remains calm and collective.

characters.name: Coal Trollwell
characters.description: Coal TrollwellGeneral informationFull NameCoal TrollwellAlt. namesCoalVoice ActorJesse MossFirst AppearancePower of FiveLatest AppearanceTBAProfileGenderMaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsThe BoyzEnemiesSimon&Snarf[Source] Coal Trollwell(born: 17 September 1991) is a troll who lives inTrollzopolis.  Coal goes toTrollzopolis High. Coal has lime green hair and thick eyebrows. He has tan skin and green eyes. The reason for Coal's clumsiness is because his hair is so disproportionate; his hair doubles his height. Coal has the features of a Troll, such as pointed ears, large feet and big hair. Coal is smart, calm and rational unlike the rest of his male troll friends. Coal does have to tendency to get rowdy when he is around the rest of his friends, but still has respect for the girls.
characters.personality_section: Coal is smart, calm and rational unlike the rest of his male troll friends. Coal does have to tendency to get rowdy when he is around the rest of his friends, but still has respect for the girls.

characters.name: Coral Trollarwise
characters.description: Coral TrollarwiseGeneral informationFull NameCoral TrollarwiseAlt. namesCoralVoice ActorAshleigh BallFirst AppearanceFirst Day of SchoolLatest AppearanceTBAProfileGenderFemaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsJade Trollberger,Opal Trollangel&The BoyzEnemiesRuby Trollman,BFFL,Simon&Snarf[Source] Coral Trollarwiseis atrollwho lives inTrollzopolis. She is a 9th grade student who goes toTrollzopolis Highand the nemesis ofRuby Trollman. Together with her two friends,Jade TrollbergerandOpal Trollangel, she bullies theBFFL girlz. She was voiced byAshleigh Ball You know those cheerleaders that are bubbly and nice and full of sugar and spice? Well that's great! Unfortunately, Coral isn't one of them. She's the head cheerleader atTrollzopolis Highand she and her friendsOpal TrollangelandJade Trollbergerare always out to pick on theBFFL crewin way that oh-so-mean girls do.

characters.name: Fizzy
characters.description: Fizzy Imagine the cute guy that works at the coffee shop down the street; always a smile, always says something nice, always gives you extra whipped cream. Now imagine that guy's complete opposite, Fizzy. Fizzy owns the trendy coffee house at the mall and the only sweet thing about him is the sugar packets in his pockets. It's possible that underneath his gruff manners he's not so bad - but he might never let the kids know.

characters.name: Flint Trollentino
characters.description:
Flint TrollentinoGeneral informationFull NameFlint TrollentinoAlt. namesFlintVoice ActorMichael Antonakos (credited as Mike Antonakos)First AppearanceBest 
Friends for LifeLatest AppearanceTBAProfileGenderMaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsThe BoyzEnemiesSimon&Snarf[Source] Flint Trollentinois atrollwho lives inTrollzopolis. He goes toTrollzopolis High. Ever have that feeling where you just kind of drift into another world, where reality slowly slips away and you're sort of floating on a cloud? You might get this feeling when your math teacher starts to talk about homework you sort of neglected to do. Well, Flint feels this way all the time. Flint is calm and loves playing his guitar, as it seems to calm him down. Flint is chill, but can still get a bit rowdy from time to time.
characters.personality_section: Flint is calm and loves playing his guitar, as it seems to calm him down. Flint is chill, but can still get a bit rowdy from time to time.

characters.name: Jasper Trollhound
characters.description: Jasper TrollhoundGeneral informationFull NameJasper TrollhoundAlt. namesJasperVoice ActorArmen Weitzman (credited as ARMEN)First AppearancePower of FiveLatest AppearanceTBAProfileGenderMaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsThe BoyzTopaz(Girlfriend)EnemiesSimon&Snarf[Source] Topaz(Girlfriend) Jasper Trollhound(born: 17 may 1991) is a troll who lives inTrollzopolis. Jasper seems to envy the girls a bit, as he gave his other guy friends the idea to mess with the Amber in the Amber Caves and get some in their navels so they can perform magic. Unfortunately since Amber is not made for boys, things went wrong. The spells had gotten messed up, eventually causing him and the rest of the trolls, both boys and girls, to get trapped inside the Amber Caves. Jasper likes to be a bad boy, as he acts cool around his guy friends, and Topaz, who has a love thing going on for him. He is able to bounce back from a disaster and "own" his own misfortunes (such as losing his hair).

characters.name: La La
characters.description: La LaisTopaz'spet rabbit. She is white with pink eyes and has a wisp of hair in the same style asTopaz. La La never appeared in the show, but she did appear in the website and as a Toy.

characters.name: Mr. Slate Trollheimer
characters.description: Mr. Slate TrollheimerGeneral informationFull NameSlate TrollheimerAlt. namesMr. TrollheimerVoice ActorJason ConneryFirst AppearanceFirst Day of SchoolLatest AppearanceBoyz and Girlz TogetherProfileGenderMaleAge3,000+HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationHigh School Science TeacherAffiliationThe AncientsMagic of the TenRelationshipsFriendsBFFL&The AncientsEnemiesSimon&Snarf[Source] Mr. Slate Trollheimeris a troll who works at Trollzopolis High School and is also the science teacher for theBFFL. He's also one of the five surviving Ancients who defeated Simon thousands of years ago, and his corresponding troll isSapphire, the smartest member of theBFFL. He appears to be the youngest of the Ancients, with barely a wrinkle and far less color fading in his hair.

His studio is theHair Salon, his paintbrush is a comb, his paints are hair-dyes, and his canvas is a full head of Troll hair. Keep his number on speed dial in case of a hair crisis.

characters.name: Mrs. Trollnut/Ms Balniski
characters.description: Mrs Trollnut(Ms Balniskiafter the Season 3 divorce) is a manager at the local Starbucks which the main character,Shale, works at. She's known as the only canonically Jewish Troll, having a full episode dedicated to her (ex) husband's Jewish hat. Her5 daughtersare not shown in the show, however, in various promotional products they are seen as being bald, which has sparked discussion into the alleged 'cancer' plot development alluded to in theTrollz Bible.  Mrs Trollnut is the longest troll in the show, being over 4ft taller than the second tallest,Shale. She has a face.

characters.name: Mrs. van der Troll
characters.description: Mrs. van der Troll lives in Trollzopolis with her daughter,Amethyst,Grandma Van Der TrollandWa-Wa, their pet. She has a loving family.

characters.name: Mrs. van der Troll

characters.name: Na Na
characters.description: Na NaisOnyx'spet Iguana. She is purple with a white underbelly, and has indigo spikes on its head. Na Na never appeared on the show, but she did appear on the website and as a toy.

characters.name: Obsidian
characters.description: ObsidianProfileGenderFemaleAge3,000+HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollAffiliationThe AncientsMagic of the TenRelationshipsFriendsBFFL,The AncientsEnemiesSimon,Snarf,[Source] Obsidianis atrollwho lives inTrollzopolis. She owns aspell shopin theTrollzopolis Malland she is one of the five surviving Ancients. 3000 years ago five young Trollz helped five old Trollz to imprison Simon. Needless to say, these young Trollz got older over time, MUCH older. These trollz are now the five Ancients. But Obsidian doesn't look a day over 2,327 years old. And no botox either! Obsidian is a wise and calm troll.
characters.personality_section: Obsidian is a wise and calm troll.

characters.name: Onyx Von Trollenberg
characters.description: Onyx Von TrollenbergTeenagerChild8 years oldGeneral informationAlt. namesOnyx Von TrollenbergVoice ActorAnna van HooftFirst AppearanceBest Friends for LifeLatest AppearanceKrakatrolla Needs Some JavaProfileGenderFemaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High School,BFFLRelationshipsFriendsBFFL,The Ancients,Na NaEnemiesSimon,Snarf,Coral Trollarwise,Opal Trollangel,Jade Trollberger[Source] Onyx Von Trollenbergis a member of theBFFL. She was born on December 25th Onyx has purple eyes and purple hair which she ties into two puffy bunches using hot pink scrunchies. She has pale white skin and a small beauty mark on the left side of her lips. She wears a white midriff-baring top with light pink polka dots under a black jacket with a red-violet spiked handcuff on each wrist, a black belt, a short white miniskirt, light pink tights, and black boots with reddish-violet straps, silver spurs, grey toes and black soles. She also wears multiple ear piercings and has lavender streaks in her hair. Her gem is purple in color and is in the shape of a moon. She is the only goth queen at her school, who is very cynical and unique as expressed by her Gothic clothing and gloomy outlook on life. She is a level-headed girl who is not afraid to tell the truth and has a distaste for anyone who lies and manipulates others. Her favorite food is double cheeseburgers with a handful of onions and she enjoys making fun of cheerleaders and beating boys at anything. Her favorite colors are black and purple.

characters.name: Principal Trollercrombie
characters.description: Principle Trollercrombie Principal Trollercrombieis the principal ofTrollzopolis Highwhere theBest Friends for Lifeattend classes. He's a strict principal, but does give breaks to those who struggle.

characters.name: Rock Trollhammer
characters.description: Rock TrollhammerGeneral informationAlt. namesRockVoice ActorMatt HillFirst AppearanceBest Friends for LifeProfileGenderMaleAge14HomeTrollzopolisSpeciesTrollOccupationStudentAffiliationTrollzopolis High SchoolRelationshipsFriendsThe Boyz,EnemiesSimon,Snarf[Source] Rock Trollhammeris a troll who lives inTrollzopolisand the love interest ofRuby Trollman. He was born on November 25th Rock has blue hair, light blue eyes, blue eyebrows and he wears a sports purple leather jacket, grey tracksuits and red shoes. Rock is shown to have the intelligence of an actual rock and a real bad temper, but he still manages to captureRuby Trollman's heart.
characters.personality_section: Rock is shown to have the intelligence of an actual rock and a real bad temper, but he still manages to captureRuby Trollman's heart.
